#  View Signed Lien Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
#####  Procore Pay Integrates with the Modernized Subcontractor Invoicing Experience
in Procore Pay, lien wavers are powered by Levelset, a Procore Company. To manage lien waivers with the Invoice Management tools in Procore, your Procore users must be using the modernized subcontractor invoicing experience.
##  Background 
After a lien waiver is signed by the payee's invoice contact, both invoice administrators and invoice contacts have the option to view the lien waiver.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You can view a signed unconditional lien waiver.   
OR
    * You can view signed unconditional lien waivers only when unlocked. See [Unlock a Signed Unconditional Lien Waiver as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/unlock-a-signed-unconditional-lien-waiver-as-an-invoice-contact).


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Sign Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/sign-lien-waivers)


##  Steps 
  1. Create a new invoice or open an existing one. 
#####  Tips
**How do you create a new invoice?** The steps you follow in your environment depend on your role and the permissions you've been granted to the Invoice Management tools in the payor's Procore project. See [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices).
  2. In the invoice, scroll to the **Lien Waivers** card.
  3. Locate the 'Signed' lien waiver to preview in the table.
  4. _Optional._ Download the file as follows:
     * Click the **Download** ![Icon Download Cloud](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2e19fa801eec8349afb1bedda0f7fc83/68221957a68806112406f3c6ce7bfdc7/icon-download-cloud.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon.   
OR
     * Click the **Attachment** link.  
  
![Viewer Download Button](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/955f910254720740377b4b2ceaaae160/9a8415138769eaf916220bfc5c5d037c/viewer-download-button.png?fm=webp)  
  
This downloads a PDF copy of the lien waiver to your computer. 
#####  Tip
       * **Where is the downloaded file?** Most web browsers save files to a Downloads folder on your computer. To find this location, Procore recommends checking your web browser's settings. You can also search for instructions online or contact your IT department for assistance.
       * **Why is the downloaded file opening automatically?** Your computer's operating system or your web browser is most likely configured to open PDF files in a specific software program. If you want to change this setting, search for instructions online or contact your IT department for assistance.
       * **Why is a 'Certificate of Signature' appended to the file download?** If the e-Sign method was used to sign the lien waiver, a 'Certificate of Signature' is appended to the PDF file when you download it. Click [here](https://support.procore.com/products/online/procore-pay/tutorials/sign-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices/e-signature-certificate.png) to see an example.


## See Also
  * [Generate Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/generate-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices)
  * [View Payment Requirements as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-payment-requirements-as-a-payor)
  * [Manage Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/manage-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices)
title: View Signed Lien Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices
description: How to view a signed lien waiver on a subcontractor invoice.
